title: NoPlacingTorch
description: The mod allows you to block the installation of torches from a spare hand
body:
# Block torch left hand mod
The mod allows you to block the installation of torches from a spare hand without resorting to any difficulties! 

**Activation mod keybind "B" Version 1.1.2**

A standard set of items on the lock list:
1. Torch
2. Soul Torch
3. Lantern
4. Soul Lantern

### **Outdated version 1.0.2:**[[

## All commands:

**/blocktorch info** - shows information about mods and commands

**/blocktorch add <item>** - adding an item to the block list

**/blocktorch list** - shows a list of blocked blocks/items

**/blocktorch del <item>** - removes the block/item from the lock list

**/blocktorch toggle** - Toggles the blocking mode

**/blocktorch clear** - removes all items/blocks


**Key bind: G - Toggle blocking**  

### **]]**


## Now the mod works with the config!

The config is located in the **config\player_blocklist.json** of the root folder!
